<!-- PR title must use conventional format: feat: / fix: / perf: / security: / infra: -->
<!-- Example: feat(auth): add SSO login via SAML -->

## Summary
<!-- Brief technical description (1–3 sentences). What changed and why? -->


## Type
- [ ] feature
- [ ] fix
- [ ] performance
- [ ] security
- [ ] infrastructure

## Customer Impact
<!-- Required for feature / performance / security PRs. -->
<!-- Who benefits? What capability is enabled? What problem does this solve? -->
<!-- Write in plain English — no internal jargon. Leave blank for internal-only changes. -->


## Metrics
<!-- Optional. Delete lines that don't apply. -->
- Performance improvement:
- Cost reduction:
- Latency change:
- Error reduction:

## Marketing Notes
<!-- Optional. Anything noteworthy for release notes, blog posts, or customer comms? -->


## Test Plan
<!-- How was this tested? Checklist of manual/automated verification. -->
- [ ]
